scene1.text: Benny the Bunny is going on an adventure! Look — there's a sparkly pond and a cozy treehouse. Where should Benny go?

scene2a.text: Splash! Benny jumps into the sparkly pond! A friendly frog named Freddy waves hello. "Want to play?" says Freddy.

scene2b.text: Benny climbs up the ladder to the treehouse. A friendly squirrel named Sally waves. "Come in!" she says.

scene3a.text: Benny and Freddy sing together on a lily pad! A beautiful rainbow appears in the sky. What a magical day!

scene3b.text: Benny and Freddy build a little boat from sticks and leaves. They sail it across the pond together. Hooray!

scene3c.text: Benny and Sally have the coziest tea party! They share cookies and warm tea inside the treehouse. Yummy!

scene3d.text: Benny and Sally look out the window at the big moon and twinkling stars. "So beautiful!" whispers Benny. Goodnight!

ending.text: What a wonderful adventure! Benny waves goodbye to all his friends. The sun sets with hearts and stars in the sky. See you next time!
